conditions.critical_condition_basis: critical conditions of adsorption of PEO

field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: Using a mixture of 15.7/ 84.3 (A/B, v/v) "critical" separation conditions were realized.
field_evidence.critical_component: determination of critical conditions of adsorption of PEO
field_evidence.column_name: BEH (Bridged Ethane Hybrid particle) C18 column
field_evidence.mobile_phase_solvents: mixtures of water with 0.1% of formic acid (component A) and acetonitrile/methanol 30:70 (v/v) (component B)
field_evidence.temperature_celsius: Column and autosampler were kept at a constant temperature of 30 ° C

conditions.notes: Critical condition established using ethoxylated fatty acid C18 alcohol (HO-PEO-(CH2)18-H).
conditions.physical_address: BAM, Federal Institute for Materials Research and Testing, Richard-Willstaetter-Strasse 11, D-12489 Berlin, Germany

conditions.notes: Mixture of 8 ethoxylated fatty acid alcohols analyzed under PEO critical conditions established previously.

conditions.critical_condition_basis: critical conditions of adsorption of PPO

field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: At a solvent composition of 85:15 THF/water (v/v), which represents the "critical" mode of separation of PPO
field_evidence.critical_component: determination of critical conditions of PPO
field_evidence.column_name: BEH (Bridged Ethane Hybrid particle) C18 column
field_evidence.mobile_phase_solvents: mixtures of water with 0.2% of formic acid (A) and tetrahydrofurane (B)
field_evidence.temperature_celsius: Column and autosampler were kept at a constant temperature of 30 ° C

conditions.notes: Critical condition established using PPO homopolymer (Mp 1020 g/mol).
conditions.physical_address: BAM, Federal Institute for Materials Research and Testing, Richard-Willstaetter-Strasse 11, D-12489 Berlin, Germany

field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: At a solvent composition of 85:15 THF/water (v/v), which represents the "critical" mode of separation of PPO (middle), the PPO/PEO copolymer was injected.
field_evidence.column_name: BEH (Bridged Ethane Hybrid particle) C18 column
field_evidence.mobile_phase_solvents: mixtures of water with 0.2% of formic acid (A) and tetrahydrofurane (B)
field_evidence.temperature_celsius: Column and autosampler were kept at a constant temperature of 30 ° C
field_evidence.flow_rate: At a flow rate of 0.5 mL/min

conditions.notes: Copolymer analyzed under PPO critical conditions. PEO block is not at critical condition.
conditions.physical_address: BAM, Federal Institute for Materials Research and Testing, Richard-Willstaetter-Strasse 11, D-12489 Berlin, Germany
